text.title: Prototyping Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the prototyping methodology end-to-end.

step.name: learning-objectives
step.action: Write 2-5 learning objectives as Y/N questions answerable from a moderated session.

step.name: fidelity
step.action: Pick paper for concept; clickable for flow; high-fi for visual nuance; code for tech-feasibility. Justify with one sentence linking to an objective.

step.name: scope
step.action: Name in_scope flows AND out_of_scope items each with reason.

step.name: write-tasks
step.action: Draft 3-5 scenario-based tasks (situation + goal + success criterion). Mark review_status=agent-draft.
step.decision-gate: If any task is instruction-based ("click", "navigate to"), rewrite before review.

step.name: researcher-review-and-decision-rule
step.action: Researcher reviews phrasing; updates review_status=human-reviewed. Author writes decision_rule (what must hold before dev).
